mission.title: knative: Fixing issue where jobs do not complete on istio enabled cluster
mission.description:
Fixes #8441

## Proposed Changes

* Fixing issue where jobs do not complete on istio enabled cluster

**Release Note**

```release-note
Fixes issue where migration jobs would fail on Istio cluster with auto-inject enabled
```
